titles_tesim: Martyrdom of Partiklos of Caesarea, Follower of Pamphilos
contents_tesim: Earliest attestation of this text in CPA. It is only known from a list as Baṭrīqlāwus (Arabic) and Patrikila (Georgian) in Sinai Georgian 34; see Sauget, pp. 316-317
